meta.title: SS Space | Content, Website, and Promotion for Business Growth
meta.description: Commercial content, digital packaging, and promotion for SMBs that need more inquiries and bookings.

hero.title: Business solutions for content, site, and ads
hero.description: We create content, build conversion-ready pages, and run focused promotion to generate qualified inquiries and new clients.
hero.trust: Not isolated services. One connected business flow from content to clients.

whatWeDo.title: Need more than separate services for your business?
whatWeDo.description: We build one connected system that combines content, digital presence, and promotion to generate client inquiries.

pillars.title: Content foundation
pillars.description: Create clear business content and assets around your offer.

pillars.title: Site / service-page conversion layer
pillars.description: Turn those assets into a page or site that explains value and drives action.

pillars.title: Promotion and client flow
pillars.description: Run targeted campaigns and route the right audience to qualified inquiries.

process.title: Three steps to a working growth flow
process.description: From business need to inquiries with one connected execution path.

steps.title: Define business need and target
steps.description: We sharpen your offer, audience, and the result your funnel should produce.

steps.title: Build content and conversion layer
steps.description: We produce content and set up the page/site structure that is ready to convert.

steps.title: Launch promotion to attract clients
steps.description: We run focused promotion and turn views and clicks into qualified business inquiries.

audience.title: SMBs that need visibility and action
audience.description: Especially businesses that want content + site + ads in one place.

difference.title: One team for content, website, and promotion
difference.description: More than a photographer and more than a page builder.
points: One execution flow for content + page + promotion
Deliverables built for response and bookings
Fast, practical turnaround for SMB timelines
Clear scope, timeline, and pricing structure
difference.callout: The goal is measurable demand, not pretty noise.

services.title: Bookable service blocks
services.description: Standard services and packaged business solutions.

items.title: Photography
items.description: Business stills for social and web.

items.title: Reels
items.description: Fast reels for reach and inquiry flow.

items.title: Editing
items.description: Video editing with subtitles and platform cuts.

items.title: Content Day
items.description: One focused production day for monthly assets.

items.title: Product / Food Photography
items.description: Product and menu visuals built for sales.

outcomes.title: Clear commercial outcomes
outcomes.description: Everything is designed to improve conversion readiness.
items: Stronger first impression for new customers
Clearer business message and visual identity
Content ready for social and paid campaigns
Service page that answers key buyer questions
Higher trust and cleaner inquiry quality
More quote requests, bookings, and WhatsApp leads

portfolio.title: Work across food, hospitality, beauty, and products
portfolio.description: Selected projects built for visibility and launch.

items.question: Is this suitable for small businesses?
items.answer: Yes. The model is built for small and medium businesses with practical budgets.

items.question: Do you build both content and website?
items.answer: Yes. The model combines content, landing page, and promotion.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Usually between two to four weeks based on scope.

items.question: Do you have entry-level packages?
items.answer: Yes. Basic, Growth, and monthly System options are available.

cta.title: Ready to start getting inquiries?
cta.description: Let us run a short brief and build your practical launch path.

contact.title: Start with one focused conversation
contact.description: Message us on WhatsApp or send a short brief and we will map the next move.

form.title: Quick Inquiry
form.messageLabel: What do you want to promote?

solutionCards.title: Business Launch Setup
solutionCards.audience: For teams launching a new service or offer.

solutionsPage.metaDescription: Industry-focused solution packages for restaurants, bars, beauty, and local services.
solutionsPage.title: Ready business packages for the local market
solutionsPage.description: Each package is designed around inquiries and bookings.

cards.title: QR Menu + Mini Site
cards.problem: Guests do not get a fast ordering path from table to action.
cards.whatWeDo: We build QR navigation, a mobile mini page, and a clear WhatsApp CTA.
cards.outcome: Faster responses and more direct order inquiries.

cards.title: Content + WhatsApp Funnel
cards.problem: Traffic exists but inquiry flow is unstable.
cards.whatWeDo: We connect production assets, inquiry page logic, and WhatsApp routing.
cards.outcome: Higher inquiry volume with better intent quality.

cards.title: Business Launch Setup
cards.problem: New offers launch without clear messaging or execution assets.
cards.whatWeDo: We define positioning, produce assets, and run a practical launch structure.
cards.outcome: Clean launch flow with conversion-ready communication.

cards.title: Beauty Booking Flow
cards.problem: Views do not convert into appointment requests.
cards.whatWeDo: We build booking-focused content, page structure, and campaign creatives.
cards.outcome: More qualified bookings and fewer low-fit leads.

cards.title: Quick Start System
cards.problem: Early-stage businesses lack a practical marketing base.
cards.whatWeDo: We set core message, first content batch, one page, and starter promotion assets.
cards.outcome: Fast market entry with active inquiry path.

pricingPage.metaDescription: Clear pricing architecture: Basic, Growth, and System / Monthly.
pricingPage.title: Three product levels
pricingPage.description: So clients can understand fit and budget quickly.
pricingPage.addonsDescription: Add extra blocks based on business needs.
pricingPage.note: Highly custom projects are quoted after a short brief.
